title: Seeing Knees in a Dream: Meaning and Interpretation
seoDescription: Seeing knees in a dream symbolizes faith, flexibility, support, and humility.
introduction: Knees, as the elements that bear the weight of our bodies and bring us down to the ground, symbolize the balance between 'pride' and 'submission' in dreams. The act of kneeling can be both a defeat and a form of worship, an expression of respect; thus, knees are the deepest reflection of our spiritual stance.
symbolism:
Knees are symbols of resilience and structure. Kneeling is an expression of lowering the ego and submitting to an authority or a sacred being. The trembling of the knees in the face of life's challenges reflects our inner fears and insecurities, while strong knees symbolize uprightness and determination.

Knees also express a kind of compassion; laying someone on your knees carries a desire to offer maternal protection and love. This symbolizes a deep commitment and a willingness to provide support. The presence of knees in our dreams allows us to question the themes of resilience and submission in our lives, inviting us on a spiritual journey.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** The New Moon offers an opportunity to revisit the balance of submission and pride symbolized by the knees. During this period, you can place your knees on the ground to enter a process of inner forgiveness and acceptance, redefining yourself and embarking on a new spiritual journey.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** The Waxing Moon symbolizes the actions needed to strengthen your knees. In this phase, by boosting your self-confidence, you can lower your ego with the determination to stand tall in life and develop a more open and respectful attitude towards authority figures.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon represents the peak and enlightenment you have reached in your spiritual stance. During this period, by establishing a balance between submission and pride, you can express your inner strength and love, show compassion to others, and feel more whole spiritually.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** The Waning Moon is the time to release your past fears and insecurities. The trembling of your knees symbolizes the burdens and obstacles that need to be let go of, allowing you to step into a spiritual transformation process to free yourself from the heavy loads of the past.
commonScenarios: Knee injury: Represents an emotional or material blow that hinders your progress; indicates a restriction in your mobility.
Falling onto your knees: Symbolizes feeling helpless in the face of an unexpected event or the breaking of the ego for a spiritual awakening.
Sitting knee to knee: Expresses closeness, intimacy, and emotional themes.
